title: Integrate Stripe Checkout with Next.js App Router
summary: Full Stripe Checkout integration — server-side client, Checkout Session API route, webhook handler with signature verification, and local testing with Stripe CLI.
declaration: I will integrate Stripe Checkout into this Next.js App Router project. This includes installing dependencies, creating a server-side Stripe client, a Checkout Session API route, and a webhook handler with signature verification. I will NOT import Stripe on the client side or skip webhook verification. If you need a different payment flow (Payment Intents, Subscriptions API directly, etc.), say so before I begin.
